Cat.name: Cat
traits: Keen Smell (The cat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.)
actions: Claws. Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.

Frog.name: Frog
traits: Amphibious (The frog can breathe air and water.)
Standing Leap (As part of its movement and without a running start, the frog can long jump up to 10 feet and high jump up to 5 feet.)
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.

Rat.name: Rat
traits: Keen Smell (The rat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.)
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.

Raven.name: Raven
traits: Mimicry (The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard. A creature can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Insight) check.)
actions: Beak. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.

Young Kruthik.name: Young Kruthik
traits: Keen Smell (The kruthik has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.)
Pack Tactics (The kruthik has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of its allies is within 5 feet of the creature and isn't incapacitated.)
Tunneler (The kruthik can burrow through solid rock at half its burrowing speed and leaves a 2 1/2-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.)
actions: Stab. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.

Goblin.name: Goblin
traits: Nimble Escape (The goblin can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.)
actions: Scimitar. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.
Shortbow. Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

Skeleton.name: Skeleton
Skeleton.languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak
traits: Vulnerable to Bludgeoning (Vulnerable to bludgeoning damage.)
Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: poisoned.
actions: Shortsword. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
Shortbow. Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

Zombie.name: Zombie
Zombie.languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak
traits: Undead Fortitude (If damage reduces the zombie to 0 hit points, it must make a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5 + the damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, the zombie drops to 1 hit point instead.)
Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: poisoned.
actions: Slam. Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) bludgeoning damage.

Sprite.name: Sprite
traits: Heart Sight (The sprite touches a creature and magically knows the creature's current emotional state or alignment. If the target fails a DC 10 Charisma save, the sprite also knows its alignment.)
Invisibility (The sprite magically turns invisible.)
actions: Longsword. Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.
Shortbow. Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 40/160 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution save or become poisoned for 1 minute.

Geonid.name: Geonid
traits: Stone Camouflage (The geonid has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.)
Stone Tell (The geonid can touch stone and learn what creatures have been in the area within the past 24 hours.)
actions: Club. Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.

Tortle.name: Tortle
traits: Natural Armor (Base AC is 17, cannot wear armor.)
Hold Breath (The tortle can hold its breath for up to 1 hour.)

Shell Defense (The tortle can withdraw into its shell as an action. Until it emerges, it gains a +4 bonus to AC and has advantage on Strength and Constitution saving throws, but its speed is 0 and it is prone.)
actions: Claws. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) slashing damage.
Quarterstaff. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

Abyssal Wretch.name: Abyssal Wretch
traits: Damage Resistances: cold, fire, lightning. Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: poisoned.
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) slashing damage.

Derro.name: Derro
traits: Magic Resistance (The derro has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.)
Sunlight Sensitivity (While in sunlight, the derro has disadvantage on attack rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.)
actions: Hooked Spear. Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) piercing damage.
Light Crossbow. Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.

Male Steeder.name: Male Steeder
traits: Spider Climb (The steeder can climb difficult surfaces without needing to make an ability check.)
Extraordinary Leap (The distance of the steeder's long jumps is tripled.)
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) poison damage.
Sticky Leg. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Small or Tiny creature. Hit: The target is stuck to the steeder's leg and grappled (escape DC 12).

The Wretched.name: The Wretched
traits: Damage Resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing while in dim light or darkness.
Wretched Pack Tactics (The Wretched has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of its allies is within 5 feet of the creature and isn't incapacitated.)
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d10 + 1) piercing damage, and the Wretched attaches to the target.

Black Bear.name: Black Bear
traits: Keen Smell (The bear has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.)
actions: Multiattack. The bear makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
Claws. Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) slashing damage.

Crocodile.name: Crocodile
traits: Hold Breath (The crocodile can hold its breath for 15 minutes.)
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the crocodile can't bite another target.

Reef Shark.name: Reef Shark
traits: Pack Tactics (The shark has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of its allies is within 5 feet and isn't incapacitated.)
Water Breathing (The shark can breathe only while underwater.)
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.

Nupperibo.name: Nupperibo
traits: Damage Resistances: acid, cold; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered. Damage Immunities: fire, poison. Condition Immunities: blinded, charmed, frightened, poisoned.
Cloud of Vermin (Any creature, other than a devil, that starts its turn within 20 feet of the nupperibo must make a DC 11 Constitution save or take 2 (1d4) piercing damage with disadvantage.)
Hunger-Driven (The nupperibo can flawlessly track any creature that has taken damage from its Cloud of Vermin within the previous 24 hours.)
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

Orc.name: Orc
traits: Aggressive (As a bonus action, the orc can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.)
actions: Greataxe. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d12 + 3) slashing damage.
Javelin. Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

Category 1 Krasis.name: Category 1 Krasis
traits: Amphibious (The krasis can breathe air and water.)
Armored Hide (The krasis has natural armor from scales, making its AC 15.)
actions: Multiattack. The krasis makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage.
Claws. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.

Brown Bear.name: Brown Bear
traits: Keen Smell (The bear has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.)
actions: Multiattack. The bear makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.
Claws. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.

Dire Wolf.name: Dire Wolf
traits: Keen Hearing and Smell
Pack Tactics
actions: Bite

Giant Spider.name: Giant Spider
Giant Spider.senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14
traits: Spider Climb (The spider can climb difficult surfaces without making an ability check.)
Web Sense (While in contact with a web, the spider knows the exact location of any other creature in the same web.)
Web Walker (The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.)
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 11 Constitution save, taking 9 (2d8) poison damage on a failed save.
Web (Recharge 5-6). Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one creature. Hit: The target is restrained by webbing (escape DC 12).

Quasit.name: Quasit
traits: Damage Resistances: cold, fire, lightning; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks. Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: poisoned.
Magic Resistance (The quasit has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.)
Shapechanger (The quasit can polymorph into a bat, centipede, or toad.)
actions: Claws (Bite in Beast Form). Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution save or take 5 (2d4) poison damage and be poisoned for 1 minute.
Scare (1/Day). One creature of the quasit's choice within 20 feet must make a DC 10 Wisdom save or be frightened for 1 minute.
Invisibility. The quasit turns invisible until it attacks or uses Scare.

Female Steeder.name: Female Steeder
traits: Spider Climb (The steeder can climb difficult surfaces without needing to make an ability check.)
Extraordinary Leap (The distance of the steeder's long jumps is tripled.)
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) poison damage.
Sticky Leg. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Medium or smaller creature. Hit: The target is stuck to the steeder's leg and grappled (escape DC 12).

Stone Cursed.name: Stone Cursed
Stone Cursed.languages: understands the languages it knew in life
traits: Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, petrified, poisoned.
Cunning Opportunist (The stone cursed has advantage on attack rolls of opportunity.)
False Appearance (While motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal statue.)
actions: Petrifying Claws. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage plus 14 (2d10 + 3) slashing damage if it had advantage. The target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or begin to turn to stone.

Bulezau.name: Bulezau
traits: Damage Resistances: cold, fire, lightning. Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: charmed, frightened, poisoned.
Rotting Presence (Non-demons starting turn within 30 ft. make DC 13 Constitution save or take 3 (1d6) necrotic damage.)
actions: Claws. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) slashing damage.
Tail. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d12 + 2) piercing damage.

Iron Cobra.name: Iron Cobra
Iron Cobra.languages: understands one language of its creator
traits: Damage Immunities: poison; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't adamantine. Condition Immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned.
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

Merregon.name: Merregon
traits: Damage Resistances: cold; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered. Damage Immunities: fire, poison. Condition Immunities: frightened, poisoned.
actions: Halberd. Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) slashing damage.
Heavy Crossbow. Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage.

Troll.name: Troll
traits: Keen Smell (The troll has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.)
Regeneration (The troll regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If the troll takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn.)
actions: Multiattack. The troll makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage.
Claw. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.

Star Spawn Mangler.name: Star Spawn Mangler
Star Spawn Mangler.skills: Saving Throws: Dex +7, Con +4. Skills: Stealth +7
traits: Damage Resistances: cold. Damage Immunities: psychic. Condition Immunities: charmed, frightened, prone.
Ambush (On the first round of combat, the mangler has advantage on attack rolls against a creature that hasn't taken a turn.)
Shadow Stealth (While in dim light or darkness, the mangler can take the Hide action as a bonus action.)
actions: Multiattack. The mangler makes two claw attacks.
Claw. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) psychic damage.
Flurry of Claws (Recharge 4-6). The mangler makes six claw attacks as a action.

Category 2 Krasis.name: Category 2 Krasis
traits: Amphibious (The krasis can breathe air and water.)
Armored Hide (Natural scales increase AC to 15.)
actions: Multiattack. The krasis makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d12 + 4) piercing damage.
Claws. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d12 + 4) slashing damage.

White Abishai.name: White Abishai
traits: Damage Resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered. Damage Immunities: cold, fire, poison. Condition Immunities: poisoned.
Devil's Sight (Magical darkness doesn't impede the abishai's darkvision.)
Magic Resistance (The abishai has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.)
actions: Multiattack. The abishai makes two attacks: one with its longsword and one with its claw.
Longsword. Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.
Claw. Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d14 + 3) slashing damage.

The Lost.name: The Lost
traits: Damage Resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing while in dim light or darkness.
actions: Multiattack. The Lost makes two arm spike attacks.
Arm Spike. Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d10 + 3) piercing damage.
Embrace. Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (4d10 + 3) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14).

Guardian Giant.name: Guardian Giant
Guardian Giant.skills: Saving Throws: Dex +6, Wis +7. Skills: Insight +7, Perception +10
traits: Vigilant (The giant can't be surprised.)
actions: Multiattack. The giant makes three spear attacks.
Spear. Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., or range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d6 + 7) piercing damage.

Gloamwing.name: Gloamwing
traits: Damage Resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks.
Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, poisoned.
actions: Multiattack. The gloamwing makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage.
Claws. Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.

Elder Oblex.name: Elder Oblex
Elder Oblex.skills: Saving Throws: Int +10, Cha +8. Skills: Arcana +10, Deception +8, History +10, Nature +10, Perception +5, Religion +10
traits: Condition Immunities: blinded, charmed, deafened, exhaustion, prone.
Amorphous (The oblex can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.)
Aversion to Fire (If the oblex takes fire damage, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.)
Sulfurous Impersonation (As a bonus action, the oblex can extrude up to 2d6 + 1 different identical simulacra.)
actions: Multiattack. The elder oblex makes two pseudopod attacks and uses Eat Memories.
Pseudopod. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 17 (4d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) psychic damage.
Eat Memories. The oblex targets one creature within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or become memory drained.

Alkilith.name: Alkilith
Alkilith.skills: Saving Throws: Dex +8, Con +10. Skills: Stealth +8
traits: Damage Resistances: acid, cold, fire, lightning; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks.
Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: charmed, frightened, poisoned.
Magic Resistance (The alkilith has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.)
actions: Multiattack. The alkilith makes three tentacle attacks.
Tentacle. Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 15 ft. Hit: 18 (4d6 + 4) acid damage.

Beholder.name: Beholder
Beholder.skills: Saving Throws: Int +8, Wis +7, Cha +8. Skills: Perception +12
traits: Antimagic Cone (The beholder's central eye creates an area of antimagic in a 150-foot cone.)
actions: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) piercing damage.
Eye Rays. The beholder shoots three of the following eye rays at random (Charm, Paralyzing, Fear, Slowing, Enervation, Telekinetic, Sleep, Petrification, Disintegration, Death Ray).

Skyswimmer.name: Skyswimmer
traits: Amphibious (The skyswimmer can breathe air and water.)
actions: Multiattack. The skyswimmer makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its slam.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw or be swallowed.
Slam. Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 30 ft. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) bludgeoning damage.

Star Spawn Seer.name: Star Spawn Seer
Star Spawn Seer.skills: Saving Throws: Dex +6, Con +9, Int +10, Wis +9, Cha +8. Skills: Perception +9
traits: Damage Resistances: cold; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks. Damage Immunities: psychic. Condition Immunities: charmed, frightened.
Out-of-Phase Movement (The seer can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain.)
actions: Multiattack. The seer makes two comet staff attacks or uses Psychic Orb twice.
Comet Staff. Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (1d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) psychic damage.
Psychic Orb. Ranged Spell Attack: +11 to hit, range 120 ft. Hit: 27 (5d10) psychic damage.

Devkarin Lich.name: Devkarin Lich
Devkarin Lich.skills: Saving Throws: Con +7, Int +9, Wis +8. Skills: Arcana +14, Insight +8, Perception +8
traits: Damage Resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks. Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned.
Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.)
Regeneration (The lich regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has fire or radiant damage.)
actions: Noxious Touch. Melee Spell Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (4d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution save or be poisoned for 1 minute.

Cadaver Collector.name: Cadaver Collector
Cadaver Collector.languages: understands all languages but can't speak
traits: Damage Immunities: necrotic, poison, psychic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't adamantine. Condition Immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned.
actions: Multiattack. The collector makes two slam attacks.
Slam. Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
Summon Specters (Recharge 5-6). The collector calls forth 1d4 specters to fight alongside it.

Phoenix.name: Phoenix
traits: Damage Resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks. Damage Immunities: fire, poison. Condition Immunities: exhaustion, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, stunned.
Fire Form (The phoenix can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide. Any creature that touches it or hits it with a melee attack within 5 feet takes 5 (1d10) fire damage.)
actions: Multiattack. The phoenix makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its fiery talons.
Beak. Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 15 ft. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) fire damage.
Fiery Talons. Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 15 ft. Hit: 17 (2d8 + 8) fire damage.

Titivilus.name: Titivilus
Titivilus.skills: Saving Throws: Dex +11, Con +8, Wis +11, Cha +13. Skills: Deception +13, Insight +11, Intimidation +13, Persuasion +13
traits: Damage Resistances: cold; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered. Damage Immunities: fire, poison. Condition Immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, poisoned.
actions: Multiattack. Titivilus makes one sword attack and uses Frightful Word once.
Silver Sword. Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage plus 16 (3d10) necrotic damage.
Frightful Word. Titivilus targets one creature he can see within 10 feet of him. The target must succeed on a DC 21 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute.

Blue Abishai.name: Blue Abishai
Blue Abishai.skills: Saving Throws: Int +12, Wis +12. Skills: Arcana +12
traits: Damage Resistances: cold; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered. Damage Immunities: fire, lightning, poison. Condition Immunities: poisoned.
actions: Multiattack. The abishai makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 11 (2d10) lightning damage.
Claw. Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.

Lazav.name: Lazav
Lazav.skills: Saving Throws: Dex +13, Int +12, Wis +11, Cha +12. Skills: Deception +18, Insight +11, Perception +11, Stealth +19
traits: Damage Resistances: necrotic, psychic. Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: charmed, frightened, poisoned.
Shapechanger Savant (Lazav can use a bonus action to polymorph into any Medium or Small humanoid he has seen.)
actions: Multiattack. Lazav makes three shortsword attacks.
Shortsword. Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (1d6 + 7) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) psychic damage.

Amnizu.name: Amnizu
Amnizu.skills: Saving Throws: Dex +6, Con +8, Wis +6, Cha +9. Skills: Arcana +10, Deception +9, History +10, Insight +6, Perception +6
traits: Damage Resistances: cold; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered. Damage Immunities: fire, poison. Condition Immunities: charmed, poisoned.
actions: Multiattack. The amnizu makes two attacks: one with its whip and one with its taskmaster's rod.
Taskmaster's Rod. Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 16 (3d10) fire damage.

Sibriex.name: Sibriex
Sibriex.skills: Saving Throws: Int +13, Cha +13. Skills: Arcana +13, History +13, Perception +13
traits: Damage Resistances: cold, fire, lightning; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks. Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: poisoned.
actions: Multiattack. The sibriex uses Squirt Bile once and makes three chain attacks.
Chain. Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 15 ft. Hit: 20 (2d12 + 7) piercing damage.

Red Abishai.name: Red Abishai
Red Abishai.skills: Saving Throws: Str +12, Con +10, Wis +8. Skills: Intimidation +10, Perception +8
traits: Damage Resistances: cold; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered. Damage Immunities: fire, poison. Condition Immunities: poisoned.
actions: Multiattack. The abishai makes three attacks: one with its bite, one with its claws, and one with its longsword.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage.

Leviathan.name: Leviathan
traits: Damage Resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks. Damage Immunities: acid, poison. Condition Immunities: exhaustion, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, stunned.
actions: Multiattack. The leviathan makes two attacks: one with its slam and one with its tail.
Slam. Melee Weapon Attack: +16 to hit, reach 20 ft. Hit: 21 (2d10 + 10) bludgeoning damage.

Astral Dreadnought.name: Astral Dreadnought
Astral Dreadnought.skills: Saving Throws: Wis +9, Cha +7. Skills: Perception +9
traits: Damage Resistances: piercing, slashing. Damage Immunities: acid, bludgeoning, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, radiant. Condition Immunities: all but invisible and prone.
actions: Multiattack. The dreadnought makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +16 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 36 (4d12 + 10) piercing damage.

Isperia.name: Isperia
Isperia.skills: Saving Throws: Dex +9, Con +11, Int +13, Wis +15. Skills: Arcana +13, History +13, Insight +15, Perception +15
traits: Damage Immunities: psychic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks. Condition Immunities: charmed, frightened.
actions: Multiattack. Isperia makes two claw attacks.
Claw. Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) slashing damage.

Jarad Vod Savo.name: Jarad Vod Savo
Jarad Vod Savo.skills: Saving Throws: Con +10, Int +12, Wis +10. Skills: Arcana +12, Insight +10, Perception +10
traits: Damage Resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks. Damage Immunities: poison. Condition Immunities: charmed, exhausted, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned.
actions: Multiattack. Jarad makes two attacks: one with his Noxious Touch and one with his Staff of Svogthir.
Noxious Touch. Melee Spell Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 28 (8d6) poison damage.

Yeenoghu.name: Yeenoghu
Yeenoghu.skills: Saving Throws: Dex +10, Con +15, Wis +14. Skills: Intimidation +9, Perception +14
traits: Damage Resistances: cold, fire, lightning. Damage Immunities: poison; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing that is nonmagical. Condition Immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, poisoned.
actions: Multiattack. Yeenoghu makes three flail attacks.
Butcher's Flail. Melee Weapon Attack: +16 to hit, reach 15 ft. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage.

Niv-Mizzet.name: Niv-Mizzet
Niv-Mizzet.skills: Saving Throws: Con +17, Int +18, Wis +11. Skills: Arcana +18, Insight +11, Perception +11
Niv-Mizzet.senses: blindsight 60 ft., darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 21
traits: Damage Resistances: cold, psychic, thunder. Damage Immunities: fire, lightning. Condition Immunities: charmed.
actions: Multiattack. Niv-Mizzet makes three attacks: one with his bite and two with his claws.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit. Hit: 18 (2d8 + 9) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) fire damage.

Tarrasque.name: Tarrasque
traits: Damage Immunities: fire, poison; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks. Condition Immunities: charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned.
Reflective Carapace (Any line spell, line of sight spell, or magic missile is automatically reflected back on a 1 on a d6.)
Magic Resistance (The tarrasque has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.)
actions: Multiattack. The tarrasque can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes five attacks: one with its bite, two with its claws, one with its horns, and one with its tail.
